taxonomy: Bucephalophora aculeata is a genus of flowering plants in the family Berberidaceae. This plant is native to Western Africa and belongs to the order Ranunculales. Bucephalophora aculeata is further classified as a species of the family Berberidaceae and genus Bucephalophora. It is closely related to other plant families such as the Ranunculaceae and the Menispermaceae. The classification of Bucephalophora aculeata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
